_comment: SHA-256 of each GitHub Release sidecar asset, keyed by release version then by asset filename. Read by build.rs: when an entry for the building version/asset is present, the build FAILS HARD on checksum mismatch; when absent it emits an 'integrity NOT verified' cargo warning. Populate at release time, e.g. `shasum -a 256 tsnet-sidecar-*` over the built assets. Asset keys must match the asset names in build.rs.
